actions.expression:
SELECT cymx.sid,
       cymx.fphm,
       cymx.khmc,
       cymx.chyrq,
       cymx.cyka,
       cymx.zzka,
       cymx.mdka,
       cymx.cdmc,
       cymx.hglx,
       cymx.zdry,
       cymx.xgry,
       CYMX.YSFP,
       cymx.jgtk,
       cymx.ysfs,
       cymx.tdh,
       cymx.htje,
       cymx.rmbkh
FROM cymx 
WHERE (cymx.fphm=[货代费用.发票号码]) 
  AND permission('') 
ORDER BY cymx.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.expression:
SELECT cdzlsheet1.sid,
       cdzlsheet1.cdbh,
       cdzlsheet1.cdmc,
       cdzlsheet1.skb,
       cdzlsheet1.xyks,
       cdzlsheet1.xyjs,
       cdzlsheet1.djr,
       cdzlsheet1.djsj,
       cdzlsheet1.xynr
FROM cdzl,cdzlsheet1 
WHERE (cdzl.sid=cdzlsheet1.pid) 
  AND (cdzlsheet1.cdmc=[货代费用.船代名称]) 
ORDER BY cdzlsheet1.sid ASC

actions.name: 指定货号财务
actions.caption: 指定货号财务
actions.expression:
SELECT dzfy.sid 
FROM dzfy,dzfysheet 
WHERE (dzfysheet.fphm=[货代费用.发票号码]) 
  AND (dzfysheet.fylx="指定货代") 
ORDER BY dzfy.sid ASC

actions.name: 自拉自报财务
actions.caption: 自拉自报财务
actions.expression:
SELECT dzfy.sid 
FROM dzfy,dzfysheet 
WHERE (dzfysheet.fphm=[货代费用.发票号码]) 
  AND (dzfysheet.fylx="自拉自报") 
ORDER BY dzfy.sid ASC

actions.name: 单报关财务
actions.caption: 单报关财务
actions.expression:
SELECT dzfy.sid 
FROM dzfy,dzfysheet 
WHERE (dzfysheet.fphm=[货代费用.发票号码]) 
  AND (dzfysheet.fylx="单报关") 
ORDER BY dzfy.sid ASC

actions.name: 特报财务
actions.caption: 特报财务
actions.expression:
SELECT dzfy.sid 
FROM dzfy,dzfysheet 
WHERE (dzfysheet.fphm=[货代费用.发票号码]) 
  AND (dzfysheet.fylx="特报费用") 
ORDER BY dzfy.sid ASC

actions.name: 商检财务
actions.caption: 商检财务
actions.expression:
SELECT dzfy.sid 
FROM dzfy,dzfysheet 
WHERE (dzfysheet.fphm=[货代费用.发票号码]) 
  AND (dzfysheet.fylx="商检费用") 
ORDER BY dzfy.sid ASC

actions.name: 计算-费用合计
actions.caption: 计算-费用合计
actions.expression: [货代费用.相关杂费.FORM费用]+[货代费用.相关杂费.价 格 单]+[货代费用.相关杂费.商 检 费]+[货代费用.相关杂费.其它杂费]+[货代费用.相关杂费.装柜费用]+[货代费用.相关杂费.进仓费用]
actions.output: 货代费用.相关杂费.费用合计

actions.name: 计算-总计内陆￥
actions.caption: 计算-总计内陆￥
actions.expression: [货代费用.指定内陆￥]+[货代费用.自报内陆￥]+[货代费用.单报内陆￥]

actions.name: 计算-总计海运$
actions.caption: 计算-总计海运$
actions.expression: [货代费用.自报海运$]+[货代费用.单报海运$]+[货代费用.指定海运$]+[货代费用.费用金额$]

actions.name: 计算-杂费合计￥
actions.caption: 计算-杂费合计￥
actions.expression: [货代费用.相关杂费.费用合计]

actions.name: 计算-费用金额￥
actions.caption: 计算-费用金额￥
actions.expression: [货代费用.费用金额￥]+[货代费用.费用金额 ￥]

actions.name: 计算-费用金额$
actions.caption: 计算-费用金额$
actions.expression: [货代费用.费用金额$]+[货代费用.费用金额 $]

view.params:
SELECT top 500 cymx.fphm, cymx.SID
FROM cymx
WHERE   ((:qxjb1=2) OR ((:qxjb1 =0) AND (cymx.sys_owner=:c_user)) OR ((:qxjb1 =1) AND (cymx.sys_path LIKE :c_depart)))
ORDER BY cymx.SID desc

SELECT huoguixh.mc,huoguixh.SID
FROM huoguixh
ORDER BY huoguixh.SID ASC

SELECT cdzl.cdmc,cdzl.SID
FROM cdzl
ORDER BY cdzl.SID ASC

FROM hdfy,hdfysheet1

   AND  (hdfysheet1.hdmc=[货代费用.货代详情.货代名称])
